required_skills: Native Android Development with Kotlin or Java
Native iOS Development with Swift or Objective-C
Mobile UI/UX Implementation and Platform Design Guidelines
RESTful API Integration in Mobile Applications
App Store and Play Store Deployment
Cross-Platform Development with React Native or Flutter
preferred_skills: Offline-First Architecture and Local Data Persistence
Mobile Security Best Practices and Certificate Pinning
Mobile Analytics and Crash Reporting Integration
Continuous Delivery for Mobile using Fastlane
responsibilities: Design and develop native Android applications using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose following Material Design 3 guidelines and Android best practices
Build native iOS applications in Swift using SwiftUI and UIKit, adhering to Apple Human Interface Guidelines for intuitive user experiences
Implement cross-platform mobile applications using React Native or Flutter that share business logic while delivering platform-native UX
Integrate RESTful and GraphQL APIs into mobile clients with robust error handling, offline caching, and background sync capabilities
Optimize mobile app performance by profiling CPU, memory, and battery usage to achieve smooth 60fps rendering on mid-range devices
Implement push notification infrastructure, deep linking, and universal links to drive user engagement and seamless navigation flows
Manage the full app release lifecycle including code signing, build automation with Fastlane, beta distribution via TestFlight, and store submissions
Write unit and UI tests using Espresso, XCTest, or Detox to ensure feature correctness and prevent regressions across OS versions
Collaborate with backend engineers to co-design mobile-optimized API contracts that minimize payload size and round trips
Monitor production app health using Firebase Crashlytics and analytics dashboards to prioritize bug fixes and performance improvements
